name: Supabase, Inc.
purpose: Database, authentication, file storage, realtime messaging, edge functions
data_processed: All user account data, messages, media files, push tokens, trust & safety records

name: Vercel, Inc.
purpose: Web hosting, serverless API functions, web analytics
data_processed: IP addresses and user-agent strings (web); push notification payloads routed via Vercel Functions; anonymised page-view analytics

name: Apple Inc. — APNs
data_processed: Device push token; notification payload (sender name and, based on your privacy setting, a message preview)

name: Google LLC — Google Fonts
purpose: Web font delivery on privacy and terms pages
data_processed: IP address at font load time (privacy.html and terms.html only; not loaded by the app itself)

name: Google LLC — Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)
data_processed: Device push token; notification payload (when Android push is shipped)
